vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1289 (feat(vbrief,scm): task vbrief:reconcile:umbrellas); part of the #742 decomposition.

narratives.Description: Auto-update each kind=epic vBRIEF's linked SCM umbrella current-shape comment per AGENTS.md section 1152. The verb edits the comment in place to preserve the permalink and leaves the amendment trail untouched, so a fresh contributor reads one accurate surface instead of reconstructing state from N comments.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: Add a new scripts/vbrief_reconcile_umbrellas.py module and a tasks/vbrief.yml entry. The script reads each kind=epic vBRIEF, walks its children, computes the wave structure, builds the canonical AGENTS.md section-1152 body, and calls the scripts/scm.py shim to edit the current-shape comment in place so the permalink is preserved. Add tests in tests/cli/test_vbrief_reconcile_umbrellas.py for pass-N bump and child-added/closed cases to verify the rendered body.
narratives.UserStory: As a fresh contributor reading an umbrella, I want the current-shape comment to be accurate, so that I can find the queue without reading the entire amendment trail.

items.title: Implement current-shape body generator from epic vBRIEF state

narrative.Acceptance: The current-shape body generator emits the AGENTS.md section-1152 canonical structure computed from epic vBRIEF state.
When run, task vbrief:reconcile:umbrellas updates the current-shape comment in place and re-running creates no change when state is unchanged.

items.title: Tests for pass-N bump + child added/closed cases

narrative.Acceptance: When the suite runs, tests/cli/test_vbrief_reconcile_umbrellas.py validates the pass-N bump and child-added/closed rendering cases.

expected_outputs: umbrella current-shape comment matches epic vBRIEF state
